final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: sports editorial photo, action shot, NBA Finals highlight moment
Primary request: low-angle shot of a #23 jersey basketball star rising above two defenders to complete a thunderous slam dunk
Scene/backdrop: packed NBA Finals arena, tens of thousands of fans standing and cheering, audience flashes flickering like a sea of stars, hardwood court floor with visible court markings and brand logos
Subject: basketball player wearing jersey number 23, body tracing a perfect athletic arc mid-air, muscle definition clearly visible under arena lighting, face expressing explosive power and intense focus; two opposing defenders below attempting to contest
Style/medium: photorealistic sports photography, editorial press photo
Composition/framing: low-angle upward shot emphasizing player's height and explosive athleticism, shallow depth of field with crowd bokeh forming a spectacular blurred backdrop, 1/2000s shutter speed freezing motion with zero motion blur
Lighting/mood: multi-point high-intensity professional arena lighting, consistent color temperature, crisp and dramatic; muscles and jersey details sharply lit from above and sides
Color palette: warm arena lighting on player's skin and jersey, deep crowd background with scattered white and colored flash bursts, bright hardwood floor with vivid court line markings
Materials/textures: glossy hardwood floor with court line paint and brand logo graphics, athletic jersey fabric with number 23, realistic skin and muscle texture
Constraints: freeze the peak moment of the dunk — player fully airborne, both defenders visible below; court floor markings and logos must be legible; no motion blur on player
Avoid: motion blur, deformed hands or fingers, floating or disconnected limbs, watermark
